sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after clicking on the left horizontal bar.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
t = last_transition
before_seg = t.before_frame.segmentation
after_seg = t.after_frame.segmentation
print("=== Before ===")
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('B', 'c', 'W'):
        print("Node %d: color=%s, pixels=%d, boundary=%s" % (n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
print("=== After ===")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('B', 'c', 'W'):
        print("Node %d: color=%s, pixels=%d, boundary=%s" % (n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 42, 'col': 36}, {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 42, 'col': 41}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
